sections.title: Writing Task 1
sections.instructions: You should spend about 20 minutes on this task.

prompt.text: The diagram below shows the floor plan of a public library 20 years ago and how it looks now. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

visuals.caption: Central Library 20 years ago and today

sections.title: Writing Task 2
sections.instructions: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task.

prompt.text: In many countries around the world, rural people are moving to cities, so the population in the countryside is decreasing. Do you think this is a positive or a negative development? Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.
